title: Among Us Mod
description: A mod that adds furniture and pets from the game among us.
body:
**REQUIREMENTS**

_[Geckolib 4.4.2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib/files/5060426)_

_Forge 47.2.0_

**Guide**

   A cosmicube is a new collectable that can give you a handful of rewards. To be able to unlock the cube you need at least a bean collectable in hand.


<details>
<summary>Cosmicube Loot</summary>


_SPECIAL_

- Knife

_FURNITURE_
  
- Iron Encased Door
- Emergency Meeting Button
- Reactor
- Vent
- Medbay
- Bean Aquarium
- Pedastel
- Romanion Gem
- Wire Vent
- Crewmate Prop

_COSMETICS_

- Top Hat
- Double Top Hat
- V.I.P Top Hat
- Brain Slug

_PETS_
 
- Hamster
- Ro-Bot
- Alien Dog

</details>


A Bean Fairy is a collectable that can be found randomly in your world. The bean fairy often mimics the allays voice to be safe from hunters. You just need to hit the fairy once to get the bean collectable.



<details>
<summary>Planned Features</summary>

- More Pets & Hats
- Structures _(With exclusive loot in them)_
- Better cover and a new title


</details>
